series_metadata.series_description: Lists total hours employee has worked in a two week pay period. Lists number of sick leave, vacation, holiday, compensatory, jury duty, etc., hours that employee has used in the same two week pay period. Forms used in conjunction with payroll time sheets

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain records in operating area through the current fiscal year plus one fiscal year, then retire to agency record storage area until one year after the release of the State Auditor's audit report, then destroy., Paper: Shred
